channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
item.description: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for May 10, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for May 10, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for May 10, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for May 10, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for May 10, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1786 on May 10 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
